zh.of Standish, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什
zh.Preston, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh.Standish, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Standish於大約1318年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親John Standish33歲，母親Margaret de Everingham27歲。他於大約1345年與Mary De Ince在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1384年在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年67歲。

zh-hans.of Standish, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什

zh-hans.Standish, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Standish于大约1318年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，他的父亲John Standish33岁，母亲Margaret de Everingham27岁。他于大约1345年与Mary De Ince在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1384年在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Standish was born about 1318, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Standish, was 33 and his mother, Margaret de Everingham, was 27. He married Mary De Ince about 1345, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1384, in Standish, Lancashire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Standish est né environ 1318, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Standish, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret d’Everingham, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary De Ince environ 1345, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1384, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Standish um 1318 in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Standish 33 und seine Mutter Margaret de Everingham 27. Er hat um 1345 in England, United Kingdom Mary De Ince geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1384 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Standish, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Standish è nato il circa 1318 nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Standish, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Everingham, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mary De Ince circa 1345, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1384, nel Standish, Lancashire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Standishが約1318年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父John Standishは33歳，母Margaret de Everinghamは27歳であった。約1345年にイギリスイギリスでMary De Inceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1384年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Standish(이)가 대략 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Standish(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Everingham(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1345년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mary De Ince(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1384년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Standish nasceu aproximadamente 1318, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Standish, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Everingham, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary De Ince aproximadamente 1345, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1384, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Standish родился около 1318 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Standish было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Everingham, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary De Ince около 1345 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1384 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Standish nació aproximadamente 1318, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Standish, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret de Everingham, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mary De Ince aproximadamente 1345, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1384, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
